faqs.title: Hello, how can we help you?
faqs.description: Here you will find answers to the most common questions about using the Estajer platform, whether you are a renter or an owner. Our goal is to make your experience smooth and ensure you fully understand every step of the process.
faqs.carouselTitle: Or choose a category to quickly get the help you need

faqs.question: What is the Estajer platform?
faqs.answer: Estajer is an online platform that allows you to rent and lease various products easily and securely, ensuring reliable transactions between both parties.

faqs.question: What types of products can be rented through the platform?
faqs.answer: You can rent a variety of products such as equipment, electronic devices, furniture, professional tools, and more, in accordance with the platform’s policies.

faqs.question: How can I register on the platform?
faqs.answer: You can register by visiting our website Estajer.com, clicking on 'Register', and following the steps to enter your details and create a new account.

faqs.question: When should I verify my account?
faqs.answer: Account verification is required when requesting to rent a product to confirm the renter’s identity, or when accepting a product for rent to ensure transaction security and protect rights.

faqs.question: Account verification for companies
faqs.answer: If you are a company or organization and wish to verify your account, please send a copy of your commercial registration and tax number to obtain company verification.

faqs.question: How can I rent a product?
faqs.answer:
● Browse the available products in different categories.
● Choose the product you want and specify the rental period.
● Pay through the platform and wait for the owner's confirmation.
● Receive the product according to the agreed delivery method.

faqs.question: How can I list my products for rent?
faqs.answer:
● Log in to your account.
● Click on 'Add New Product' and enter the product details, images, price, and rental duration.
● You can set a security deposit (optional).
● After approval, deliver the product to the renter as agreed.

faqs.question: Can I contact the owner before renting?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can use the messaging feature within the platform to contact the owner and ask any questions before confirming the booking.

faqs.question: What are the delivery methods for the product?
faqs.answer: The delivery method is determined between the owner and the renter, either through direct handover or available delivery services.

faqs.question: Can I rent products for long periods?
faqs.answer: Yes, the owner can set rental options on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis depending on the product type.

faqs.question: When and how are rental payments transferred to my account?
faqs.answer:
● You must add your bank details during registration, matching your personal information.
● Payments are transferred within 3 to 7 days after completing the rental transaction.
● Transfers are made only when the balance reaches 200 SAR or more.
● A fee of 3 SAR is deducted per withdrawal transaction, plus VAT.

faqs.question: How are payments processed?
faqs.answer: All payments are made through the platform using secure payment methods, and the amount is transferred to the owner after confirming that the product has been received in good condition.

faqs.question: Are there any fees for using the platform?
faqs.answer: The platform charges a commission on each successful rental transaction, which is clearly displayed when publishing the product or completing the payment.

faqs.question: How does Estajer protect my rights as an owner?
faqs.answer:
● You can add a security deposit that is held until the end of the rental period.
● Document the product with photos and videos before and after the rental to protect your rights.
● In case of an issue, contact us at info@estajer.com.

faqs.question: How can I ensure my rights when renting out my products?
faqs.answer:
● You can set a security deposit that will be withheld from the renter for each rental and refunded after you confirm the product is in good condition.
● Document the product with photos and videos before delivery.
● Keep invoices and serial numbers to facilitate claims.
● In case of any damage or delay, submit a complaint within 24 hours through the platform or via info@estajer.com.

faqs.question: What should I do if the renter doesn’t return the product on time?
faqs.answer: You can contact them directly or file a complaint through the platform within 24 hours after the rental period ends.

faqs.question: What should I do if I receive a damaged product?
faqs.answer: Document the product’s condition with photos and videos immediately upon receipt, then contact us at info@estajer.com to resolve the issue.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my booking after payment?
faqs.answer: The cancellation policy depends on the owner’s terms, so make sure to review the cancellation policy listed in the product details before booking.

faqs.question: How can I file a complaint?
faqs.answer: If you face any issue, you can file a complaint through your account on the platform or contact us via email at info@estajer.com.
